description: A safety-oriented CLI for agent and human workflows with Jira and Confluence Server/Data Center.
rules: CLI output is JSON by default; use -o text only for human-readable Markdown and -o id only where the command documents an identity projection.
Confluence .csf and Jira .wiki files are native write substrates. Markdown files are derived staging views and must use the guarded apply workflow before push.
Never convert Confluence Storage Format through Markdown on the server write path; preserve native body bytes and opaque fragments.
Sentinel errors define stable process exit classes. Agents and scripts must branch on documented exit codes instead of matching error text.
atl supports Jira and Confluence Server/Data Center bearer PATs; Atlassian Cloud email/API-token authentication is not supported.
